description_long: This is a classic biplane with a bright red fuselage and two stacked wings connected by black struts. The airplane features a single wooden propeller at the front, a visible open cockpit situated just behind the upper wing, and a prominent machine gun mounted in front of the cockpit. The tail section includes a horizontal stabilizer and a single vertical fin, both matching the red color of the main body. The engine cowling is painted a light blue, contrasting with the rest of the aircraft. Rivet details and panel lines are visible along the wings and fuselage, giving it a vintage, early 20th-century appearance.
description: A vintage red biplane with dual wings, an open cockpit, and a front-mounted wooden propeller. It features a machine gun and detailed rivet paneling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red fuselage, dual wings, open cockpit, and the machine gun mounted in front of the cockpit.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden propeller, blue engine cowling, and the stacked biplane wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail structure, wing struts, and the machine gun's placement relative to the cockpit.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wingspan, cockpit opening, and the alignment of the tail and wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a rear tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, mid-fuselage.
